title: Dirt Armor and Tools
description: Adds OP dirt armor, tools, and even a dirt bow!
body:
# Dirt Armor and Tools

This Minecraft mod introduces dirt-based armor, tools, and a bow, offering players a fresh twist on traditional gameplay. Smelted from abundant dirt blocks, the new dirt ingot provides new crafting recipies, while the tools offer accessible resource gathering and combat options, and the armor adds new ways to pvp. Smelting dirt yields dirt ingots, enabling the creation of various items. The dirt bow adds a unique ranged weapon, allowing players to launch dirt-based projectiles with surprising force. Seamlessly integrating into vanilla Minecraft worlds, this mod enhances the gameplay experience for adventurers seeking new challenges and creative possibilities.
  
Make sure to troll your friends with this **OP Loot!**

## ⚠️ PLEASE READ ⚠️

We are now discontinuing our Neoforge version of this mod. This means that the only avalible version will be Forge 1.20.1.
